start.speaker: Timorous & Mistrust
start.text: Go back! There are lions in the way ahead — we saw them and fled. The further you go, the more danger you meet!
start.text_zh: 回头吧！前面的路上有狮子——我们看见了就逃了回来。你越往前走，遇见的危险就越多！

choices.text: To go back is death; to go on is feared death and then life. I will go on.
choices.text_zh: 回去是死；前行不过是所惧怕的死，之后却是生。我要前行。

choices.text: Their fear shakes me — but the lions may be chained. I will look before I flee.
choices.text_zh: 他们的惧怕动摇了我——但那些狮子或许是被链子拴着的。我要看清楚，再决定逃不逃。
